Name: RequirementsDeepDive
Description: Three-step requirements elaboration: BusinessAnalyst refines requirements, Stakeholder validates business alignment, then Engineer assesses technical feasibility.

Steps.Name: Elaborate
Steps.Description: BusinessAnalyst produces and refines a structured requirements set.

Steps.Name: StakeholderValidation
Steps.Description: Stakeholder reviews the requirements for business alignment and completeness.

Steps.Name: FeasibilityCheck
Steps.Description: Engineer assesses technical feasibility, identifies risks, and flags any requirements that need rework.
